Notes: Single UPDATE adds an A RR to host1.campus.edu. and then deletes the entire same A RRset in the same message. The follow-up query checks whether the RRset survives, disappears, or the UPDATE is rejected.

Steps.Description: Add host1.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.20 and then delete the host1.campus.edu. A RRset in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the UPDATE.
